description_long: This is a lifelike chicken with a robust, rounded body covered in a mix of brown, black, and cream feathers. Its head is adorned with a red comb and wattles, and it has a sharp, yellow beak. The neck feathers are lighter and finely patterned, transitioning to darker, more mottled plumage on the back and tail. The tail feathers are prominent and slightly raised, with a darker hue compared to the rest of the body. Its legs are scaly and pale, ending in three forward-pointing toes and one rear toe, each tipped with a claw. The chicken's alert posture and detailed feather patterning suggest a healthy, active bird commonly seen in urban or rural environments.
description: A realistic chicken with a red comb, yellow beak, and intricately patterned brown and black feathers, standing alert with raised tail feathers.
description_view_0: Front view showing the chicken's red comb, yellow beak, and broad chest with lighter neck feathers.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the chicken's profile, feather pattern transition from neck to tail, and visible leg and claws.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the dark, raised tail feathers and the symmetrical patterning on the back.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the chicken's head, comb, and the curve of its body and tail.
